news.title: Michigan tests expanding free ‘pre-K for all’ to home child-care providers
news.summary_en: A new program tests no-cost pre-K in home child care settings. Up until now, students had to attend a school or child care center to qualify for the free option.
news.author: Isabel Lohman

news.title: Michigan schools get creative, competitive, to curb high absenteeism
news.summary_en: Michigan schools want to boost the number of students regularly showing up for class. Can competitions help boost attendance?
news.author: Isabel Lohman
